locations.name: 玻利維亞
locations.summary: 玻利維亞多民族國（西班牙語：Estado Plurinacional de Bolivia），通稱玻利維亞，是位於南美洲中西部的內陸國家，與巴西、秘魯、智利、阿根廷、巴拉圭五國接壤，亦為南美洲國家聯盟的成員國；其法定首都為蘇克雷，但實際上…

relations.subject: Bolivian recurvebill
relations.evidence: The Bolivian recurvebill (Syndactyla striata) is a bird species in the Furnariinae subfamily of the ovenbird family Furnariidae. It is found in Bolivia and Peru.Remsen, J

relations.subject: Bolivian recurvebill
relations.evidence: The principal threat is deforestation for agriculture and human settlement, and through logging and mining operations
relations.object_summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。
